data.title: Add Phase 2.8 ADR generation and remove C2 question from architect-foundation SKILL.md
data.description:
Two changes to plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md:

Change 1 - Remove C2 question (line 95):
Remove: '**C2. ADR preference** — Ask the user whether they want Architecture Decision Records for choices already made, only for new decisions introduced by this scaffolding session, or both.'
Group C will contain only C1 after removal.

Change 2 - Add Phase 2.8: ADR Generation (new section after Phase 2.75):

## Phase 2.8: ADR Generation

Always generate ADRs for all architectural decisions made during this session — do not ask whether to generate them.

**Session scope**: Generate ADRs for decisions from the current session only — decisions made in Phase 1 dialogue and accepted in Phase 2.5 recommendations. Do not generate ADRs for decisions that pre-date this session.

**Format**: docs/adr/NNNN-<decision-slug>.md using the standard ADR template (Status, Context, Decision, Consequences). NNNN is zero-padded sequential.

**Deduplication**: Keyed on decision topic. Before writing each ADR, check whether an ADR for the same topic already exists (match by ADR title or filename slug). If a matching ADR exists, update it in place rather than creating a duplicate file. The dedup key is the short decision slug (e.g., 'adapter-boundary-enforcement', 'config-typed-boundary').

Makes Task 9052-1343's RED tests turn GREEN.
Phase 2.5 accept/reject section must remain UNCHANGED.

testing_mode: GREEN
File: plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/SKILL.md
